title: EU Roaming Portfolio 2026
snippet: Business plans keep domestic allowances across the EU, with pooled alerts before fair-use thresholds are reached.

title: Campus Network Reference Architecture
snippet: Coverage, latency targets, identity controls, and device segmentation must be designed together.

snippet: Premium tiers add named service management, proactive notifications, and expanded multilingual support.

title: Secure AI Assistant Blueprint
snippet: Grounding, human escalation, policy checks, and audit logging are treated as product features, not afterthoughts.

title: Direct Web Answer System Comparison
snippet: Open-web answer engines accelerate discovery, while enterprise deployments require stronger policy, privacy, and traceability layers.
